Elite Home Group  ·  Private Collection
New Hartford · Oneida County · NY
Est. Residence · Verne Swan, Architect
1715 Sherman Drive
For Sale — Designed by Verne Swan

A brick & cedar original, held above the Mohawk Valley.

Set behind a circular drive on nearly two landscaped acres, this architect-designed residence pairs enduring craftsmanship — Rochester oak floors, custom millwork, two fireplaces — with more than 4,200 square feet of considered space.

$739,900
Offered by Elite Home Group
Bedrooms
4
Bathrooms
4
Interior
4,206
Acreage
1.9
The Residence

A circular driveway welcomes you to a home that has kept its character for a lifetime — a spectacular living room beneath oversized windows, a richly paneled library and bar with its own fireplace, an elegant formal dining room, and a sunlit breakfast area off the kitchen. Upstairs, a spacious primary suite with built-ins joins three further bedrooms. Below, a sauna.

01

Two hearths, one library

A wood-burning fireplace anchors the living room; a second warms the paneled library and bar — the kind of rooms built for long winters.

02

Rochester oak, throughout

Original oak hardwood floors and exceptional custom millwork carry the architect's hand from room to room.

03

A primary suite with room to spare

Abundant closet space and built-ins in the primary, with three additional bedrooms and beautifully appointed baths.

04

Grounds made for privacy

A tranquil patio, mature gardens, and picturesque surroundings on nearly two acres — with valley views beyond.
